title: Customised My Space settings to default on duplicated Boards
excerpt:
When duplicating a Board, it would be brilliant if you could add the Customisations set in My Work Space for the original Board to carry over to the duplication. 
At present, each time a new Board is duplicated, we have …

posts.author: AmandaW (Amanda Wood)
posts.cookedHtml:
When duplicating a Board, it would be brilliant if you could add the Customisations set in My Work Space for the original Board to carry over to the duplication.
At present, each time a new Board is duplicated, we have to drill into Customizing the Work Space to edit each new Board, sometimes on multiple platforms e.g. Status and Date
